MUST: Middleware MUST intercept ALL requests to enforce geographic access policies (RF-001)
Middleware MUST bypass geo-restriction for authenticated users already validated (RF-001)
Middleware MUST redirect ALL users outside Milagro to servicio_no_disponible (RF-001)
Middleware MUST store geo_blocked, geo_city, geo_region, geo_country in session on denial (RNF-007)
Middleware MUST attach geo_data to request object for downstream view consumption (RF-001)
Middleware MUST log all access attempts with location and decision (RNF-007)
Middleware MUST delegate geo verification to check_geo_restriction() in utils/geo.py (RNF-004)
SHOULD: Middleware SHOULD handle geolocation failures gracefully without crashing (RNF-003)
Middleware SHOULD cache geo data in session to reduce API calls (RF-001)
MUST_NOT: Middleware MUST NOT allow access to student features outside Milagro (RF-001)
Middleware MUST NOT implement geo verification logic inline (RNF-004)
Middleware MUST NOT expose detailed geolocation errors to end users (RNF-002)
Middleware MUST NOT log sensitive location data beyond what's necessary (RNF-007, RNF-008)
